title: Crowd Pleaser Omelette
description: A simple and delicious omelette perfect for a crowd, requiring minimal ingredients and effort.

ingredients.name: Fermented
ingredients.notes: any fermented ingredient (soy sauce, vinegar, etc.)

instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the fermented ingredient, light ingredient, and crowd pleaser ingredients to the pan.
Pour the whisked eggs over the ingredients in the pan.
Allow the eggs to set, then use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the omelette towards the center.
Once the eggs are almost set, use the spatula to fold the omelette in half.
Cook for an additional 30 seconds to 1 minute, until the eggs are fully set.
Slide the omelette out of the pan onto a plate and serve hot.
